ranking.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
ranking.description_ja: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
ranking.readme_summary: π RuView: WiFi DensePose: **See through walls with WiFi.** No cameras. No wearables. Just radio waves
ranking.readme_summary_ja: π RuView: WiFi DensePose: **See through walls with WiFi.** No cameras. No wearables. Just radio waves

ranking.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

ranking.readme_summary: Welcome to Anthropic's Prompt Engineering Interactive Tutorial Course introduction and goals This course is intended to provide you with a comprehensive step-by-step understanding of how to engineer optimal prompts within Claude. **After completing this course, you will be able to**: - Master the basic structure of a good prompt - Recognize common failure modes and learn the '80/20' techniques to address them - Understand Claude's strengths and weaknesses - Build strong prompts from scratch for ...

ranking.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. ranking.description: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.
ranking.description_ja: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

ranking.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

ranking.readme_summary: MarkItDown ![PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/markitdown/) !PyPI - Downloads ![Built by AutoGen Team](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen) > [!TIP] > MarkItDown now offers an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for integration with LLM applications like Claude Desktop. ranking.description: Servo aims to empower developers with a lightweight, high-performance alternative for embedding web technologies in applications.
ranking.description_ja: Servo aims to empower developers with a lightweight, high-performance alternative for embedding web technologies in applications.
ranking.readme_summary: The Servo Parallel Browser Engine Project Servo is a prototype web browser engine written in the Rust language. It is currently developed on 64-bit macOS, 64-bit Linux, 64-bit Windows, 64-bit OpenHarmony, and Android. Servo welcomes contribution from everyone
ranking.readme_summary_ja: The Servo Parallel Browser Engine Project Servo is a prototype web browser engine written in the Rust language. It is currently developed on 64-bit macOS, 64-bit Linux, 64-bit Windows, 64-bit OpenHarmony, and Android. Servo welcomes contribution from everyone
